title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China's JAKA Pi features a split AI brain system for real-time control. Vietnam introduced two humanoid robots including the Dyno for security and service work, and the VR-H3 for industrial applications. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor and Unitree H2 for researchers.
